stemHtml: While flying in North Atlantic High Level Airspace (HLA), which of the following could result in a navigation error?

options.a: Flying using only conventional navigation aids instead of Long-Range Navigation Systems (LRNS).
options.b: Receiving a clearance that deviates from the original route or flight level.
options.c: Failing to cross-check position reports with ADS-C or CPDLC.
options.d: Failing to report passing oceanic waypoints on VHF.
